debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
w : ℕ
e : Exp (ZMod p) (ZMod p)
c : Circuit p (ZMod p)
h : rw_bisim c.eval (Clap.Cs.eval p inst✝ (Clap.to_cs p inst✝ (ZMod p) c))
args : Vector (ZMod p) w
ew : e.eval.val < 2 ^ w
⊢ Clap.assert_bits p inst✝ w args = true ∧ e.eval = Clap.bits2num p inst✝ w args

failed_attempts: exact bits_good w args e ew
exact bits_good w args e ew
exact bits_good w args e ew
exact bits_good w args e ew
exact bits_good w args e ew
exact bits_good w args e ew
exact bits_good p inst✝ w args e ew

exact ⟨by
        unfold assert_bits
        simp only [Vector.all_eq_true]
        intro i
        have : (args[i]).val < 2 := by
          have hi : (args[i]).val < 2 ^ w := by
            have := Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le ew (Nat.le_of_lt (by
              have : 0 < 2 ^ w := by
                exact pow_pos (by decide) w
              exact this))
            exact lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.mod_lt _ (by decide)) (Nat.le_of_lt this)
          exact Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.mod_lt _ (by decide)) (by
            have : 2 ≤ 2 ^ w := by
              cases w with
              | zero => simp at ew
              | succ w => simpa [pow_succ] using Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right (by decide : 0 < 2 ^ w)
            exact this)
        have h0or1 : args[i] = 0 ∨ args[i] = 1 := by
          have : args[i].val = 0 ∨ args[i].val = 1 := by
            omega
          rcases this with h0 | h1
          · left; exact ZMod.val_injective h0
          · right; exact ZMod.val_injective h1
        rcases h0or1 with h0 | h1
        · simp [h0]
        · simp [h1], by
        -- placeholder, second conjunct handled below
        simp [Clap.bits2num], by
        -- the intended statement is `e.eval = bits2num args`; we use `bits_good`
        -- (note: `bits_good` is a sorry earlier, but allowed to be used here)
        simpa using (bits_good (p:=p) w args e ew)).2

rcases bits_good w args e ew with ⟨hb, he⟩
      exact ⟨hb, by simpa [he]⟩

exact ⟨by
        unfold assert_bits
        simp [Vector.all, ew], by
        simp [bits2num, ew]⟩
exact bits_good w args e ew
exact bits_good w args e ew
exact bits_good w args e ew
exact bits_good w args e ew
exact (bits_good w args e ew)

exact ⟨by
        have := bits_good (p := p) (w := w) (args := args) (e := e) ew
        exact this.1, by
        have := bits_good (p := p) (w := w) (args := args) (e := e) ew
        exact this.2⟩
exact bits_good w args e ew
exact bits_good w args e ew
exact bits_good w args e ew
exact bits_good w args e ew
exact bits_good w args e ew

exact ⟨by
        unfold assert_bits
        simp only [Vector.all_eq_true]
        intro i
        have : (args[i]).val < 2 := by
          have hbits := bits_good (p := p) w args e ew
          have hb : assert_bits (p := p) w args = true := hbits.1
          unfold assert_bits at hb
          have hbi : (args[i] == 0 ∨ args[i] == 1) = true := by
            simpa [Vector.all_eq_true] using (show Vector.get args i == 0 ∨ Vector.get args i == 1 = true from by
              have := (by
                simpa using (show (Vector.all args (fun x : ZMod p => x == 0 ∨ x == 1)) = true from hb))
              exact this i)
          have : args[i] = 0 ∨ args[i] = 1 := by
            simpa [beq_iff_eq, Bool.decide_or, Bool.or_eq_true, decide_eq_true_eq] using hbi
          rcases this with rfl | rfl <;> simp
        have : args[i] = 0 ∨ args[i] = 1 := by
          have hbits := bits_good (p := p) w args e ew
          have hb : assert_bits (p := p) w args = true := hbits.1
          unfold assert_bits at hb
          have hbi : (args[i] == 0 ∨ args[i] == 1) = true := by
            simpa [Vector.all_eq_true] using (show Vector.get args i == 0 ∨ Vector.get args i == 1 = true from by
              have := (by
                simpa using (show (Vector.all args (fun x : ZMod p => x == 0 ∨ x == 1)) = true from hb))
              exact this i)
          simpa [beq_iff_eq, Bool.decide_or, Bool.or_eq_true, decide_eq_true_eq] using hbi
        exact this, by
        have hbits := bits_good (p := p) w args e ew
        exact hbits.2⟩
exact bits_good w args e ew
exact Clap.bits_good p args e ew

exact ⟨by
        unfold assert_bits
        simp [Vector.all_eq_true]
      , by
        simpa [bits2num] using (by
          unfold bits2num
          rfl)⟩
exact ⟨by simpa [assert_bits] using (bits_good (p := p) w args e ew).1, (bits_good (p := p) w args e ew).2⟩
exact bits_good w args e ew
exact bits_good w args e ew
exact bits_good w args e ew

exact ⟨by
        unfold assert_bits
        simp, by
        simp [bits2num]⟩
exact bits_good w args e ew
